signals.headline: **Inflation revised upward:** The BOK now expects inflation to move into the "mid to upper two-percent range" driven by
signals.raw: **Inflation revised upward:** The BOK now expects inflation to move into the "mid to upper two-percent range" driven by surging oil costs, up from the previous 2.2% forecast.[4]

signals.headline: **No rate change:** The unanimous decision to hold rates steady reflects constraints on policy flexibility—inflation pre
signals.raw: **No rate change:** The unanimous decision to hold rates steady reflects constraints on policy flexibility—inflation pressures prevent easing while slowing growth (expected to fall below 2% this year) prevents tightening.[5]
